title: Build per-quiz analytics API with breakdowns and time-series
completion_summary: Built per-quiz analytics API with summary metrics, per-question funnel, top answers/products breakdowns, 30-day time-series, and date-range filtering via ?from/?to params
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/admin/quizzes/[id]/analytics verifies session and resolves store (401 if invalid)
Verifies quiz belongs to authenticated store (404 if not found or wrong store)
Returns summary: total_views (question_answered events), total_completions, conversion_rate
Returns top_answers: top 10 answers by frequency (count and answer title) from Submission.answers JSON
Returns top_products: top 10 recommended products by frequency from Submission.recommendedProducts JSON
Returns funnel: array of { questionTitle, viewCount, dropOffCount, dropOffRate } for each question
Returns time_series: array of { date, views, completions } grouped by day for the last 30 days
Supports optional ?from and ?to query params to filter date range
Response shape: { quizId, quizName, summary, topAnswers, topProducts, funnel, timeSeries, computedAt }
All queries scoped to quizId and authenticated storeId
Follows existing admin API patterns with resolveStore helper
